title: Marketplace Manager - Ecom Express - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Ecom Express - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Ecom Express invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ecom Express:
Ecom Express is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express!
